data.title: STOCKS | India's Earnings Recovery and IT Stock Contrarians Highlighted
data.description: India's financial markets are witnessing a budding recovery in earnings, according to a recent analysis. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the emergence of contrarians within the IT stock sector, which could influence market dynamics. Additionally, concerns are rising over potential risks to domestic liquidity, which may impact the broader economic landscape. These developments are crucial for investors and analysts monitoring India's market trends.

data.title: Prices of many traditional financial assets fell, with gold and crude oil weakening.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices fluctuated to $4,960 per ounce, a daily decrease of 0.63%. Silver prices changed to $75.9 per ounce, a daily increase of 0.05%. Regarding volatility indices, the BVIX (BTC volatility index) was last at 52.52, down 0.36% on the day; the EVIX (ETH volatility index) was last at 69.67, down 0.53% on the day. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 0.17% to $63.59 per barrel; Brent crude oil fell 0.14% to $68.65 per barrel.

data.title: Wintermute Launches Institutional OTC Trading for Tokenized Gold
data.description:
Digital asset market maker Wintermute has introduced institutional over-the-counter (OTC) trading for tokenized gold products, expanding its footprint into on-chain commodities. The new desk focuses on the two largest gold-backed tokens by market capitalization: Pax Gold (PAXG) and Tether Gold(XAUT).
source: https://www.ethnews.com/wintermute-launches-institutional-otc-trading-for-tokenized-gold/

data.title: U.S. Engages in Talks with Cuba Amid Economic Challenges
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that American government representatives are in dialogue with Cuba's Communist leadership. Bloomberg posted on X that these discussions come as Cuba grapples with deteriorating economic circumstances. Secretary of State Marco Rubio is among the officials involved in these talks, aiming to address the island nation's financial difficulties.

data.title: Polygon's USDC Transaction Volume Surpasses Solana, Sets New Records
data.description: Polygon has achieved a new milestone in its weekly USDC transaction volume, reaching 28 million and surpassing Solana's 22 million, making it the most active USDC chain. According to NS3.AI, the network has also set records in stablecoin transfers and native token activity, contributing to significant market share gains. Furthermore, Polygon has joined the Enterprise Ethereum Alliance and plans to support USDC tax refunds at key airports during the 2026 Winter Olympics.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 630 USDT with a 2.66% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 17, 2026, 02:46 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 630 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 630.159973 USDT, with a narrowed 2.66% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Solana Range Compression Is Signaling A Major Move Ahead
data.description:
Solana is tightly compressed inside a defined range after sweeping liquidity on both sides. With volatility fading and pressure building, the current structure suggests a major breakout move could be approaching. $77–$90 Range Remains Firmly Intact Solana remains locked inside a well-defined $77–$90 range, with the broader outlook suggesting that any major resolution is more likely to unfold to the downside toward $57. According to Umair Crypto, the price has been consolidating within this band for the past 11 days, with liquidity already swept on both ends
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/solana/solana-range-compression-is-signaling-a-major-move-ahead/

data.title: USDC transactions on Polygon reached 28 million per week, surpassing Solana to become the most active USDC chain.
data.description: Data analyst Peter wrote on the X platform that Polygon network stablecoin data performed remarkably well last week. Polygon's USDC weekly transaction volume reached 28 million transactions, a new weekly record, surpassing Solana's 22 million transactions to become the most active USDC chain in the ecosystem. USDC transfers reached 103 million, a weekly record, capturing 46% of the market share. Among all USD stablecoins, Polygon recorded 32.6 million transactions, a 67% increase, second only to Solana's 600,000 transactions. Polygon processed 120 million USD stablecoin transfers, surpassing BNB for the first time. In terms of payment transfers, the number of transfers in January approached 2 million. Furthermore, Polygon's x402 achieved a weekly native transfer volume of $1.2 million and 358,000 transactions, both ranking first across the entire chain. Other developments include Polygon joining the Enterprise Ethereum Alliance; Polygon will provide USDC tax refunds for airports in Milan, Rome, and Venice during the 2026 Winter Olympics; and Polygon has proposed PIP 82, which plans to recover up to $1 million in gas base fees through PIP 65 to support proxy business activities.

data.title: Matrixport: Market sentiment has fallen to a low level, and prices may weaken further in the short term.
data.description: Matrixport, in an article published on the X platform, stated that market sentiment has fallen to a low level, with pessimism dominating. Looking at the "Greed and Fear Index," more sustainable bottoms typically appear after the 21-day moving average of the daily sentiment indicator crosses below zero and then rebounds. This "weak-to-strong" shift usually indicates that selling pressure is nearing its end, and the market is entering a recovery and stabilization phase. Short-term prices may still weaken further, but historically, deep negative sentiment has often corresponded to a more favorable risk-reward range. Based on the cyclical correlation between sentiment and price, the current reading suggests the market may be approaching a key turning point. The key focus going forward will be whether core signals show signs of improvement typical of pre-rebound periods.

data.title: The address with the largest unrealized profit on Ethereum short positions on HyperLiquid currently holds a floating profit of $8.277 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, address 0xed4…c6029 has become the address with the most profitable short position on Hyperliquid Ethereum. Since opening the position on December 10, it has accumulated a short position of 8,510 ETH with 25x leverage. The last time it added to the position was 3 days ago, with an average opening price of $2,978.15. Currently, the unrealized profit is $8.277 million.

data.title: Bitdeer sold 179.9 BTC last week, and its Bitcoin holdings fell below the 1,000 mark.
data.description: According to a post on the X platform by BitcoinTreasuries, Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. Last week, its Bitcoin mining output was 183.4 BTC, but it sold 179.9 BTC during the same period, resulting in a net decrease of 96.5 BTC in its Bitcoin holdings. Its Bitcoin holdings have fallen below the 1,000 BTC mark, reaching approximately 943.1 BTC.

data.title: Significant PUIMP Token Sale: Wallet Offloads 543.23 Million Tokens for 1.207 Million USDC
data.description: A wallet associated with Pump.fun's hosted service recently executed a substantial sale of 543.23 million PUIMP tokens, resulting in approximately 1.207 million USDC. According to NS3.AI, this transaction occurred about two hours ago. The wallet initially acquired 3.75 billion PUMP tokens seven months prior, with a valuation of $25.39 million at that time. This significant token movement may influence PUIMP's market dynamics.

data.title: Presidents' Day Celebrates Leadership in the United States
data.description: On Presidents' Day, the United States reflects on the contributions of its leaders throughout history. The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) posted on X, highlighting the significance of this day in honoring not only the first commander in chief but all individuals who have taken on the responsibility of leading the nation. This federal holiday serves as a reminder of the dedication and service of past and present leaders who have shaped the country's path.

data.title: Shooting Incident in Rhode Island Leaves Three Dead and Three Injured
data.description: A shooting occurred at a sports facility in Pawtucket, Rhode Island, on Monday, resulting in three fatalities, including the shooter, and three injuries. According to Ming Pao, the incident has raised concerns about safety in the area. Authorities are investigating the circumstances surrounding the event to determine the motive and any potential connections between the individuals involved. Local residents have expressed shock and sadness over the tragedy, highlighting the need for increased security measures in public spaces. Further updates are expected as the investigation progresses.

data.title: Hyperliquid $ETH Short Position Achieves Significant Profit
data.description: An analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X that the address 0xed4…c6029 has become the most profitable holder of a Hyperliquid $ETH short position. Since opening the position on December 10, the address has maintained a 25x short position with a total of 8,510 ETH. The most recent increase in the position occurred three days ago, with an average opening price of $2,978.15. The current unrealized profit stands at $8.277 million.

data.title: Palliser Capital Invests in Toto to Leverage AI Opportunities
data.description: Activist fund Palliser Capital has acquired a stake in Japanese washlet manufacturer Toto. Bloomberg posted on X, Palliser is urging Toto to enhance the promotion of its lesser-known chip parts business to capitalize on the growing AI market. The move is seen as a strategy to unlock potential value amid the AI industry's expansion.

data.title: Bitcoin's weekly RSI is approaching the lows of the 2022 bear market, and the liquidity crunch is intensifying the battle between bulls and bears.
data.description: According to Cointelegraph, amid thin trading in global markets due to the holiday, Bitcoin surged to $70,000 before quickly retreating, fluctuating within a narrow range as both long and short positions were squeezed by "liquidation." Data shows that order book depth decreased during the holiday, making large sums of money more likely to influence short-term price movements; $120 million in liquidations occurred across the network in the past four hours. The order book repeatedly saw buy and sell walls being swept away and quickly rebuilt, with new selling pressure above the price exacerbating short-term downward pressure. Data analytics firm Material Indicators described the current trend as "a mix of breakout and consolidation." Technically, Bitcoin's weekly Relative Strength Index (RSI) fell to 27.8, its lowest level since June 2022, breaking below the "oversold" threshold of 30. Analysis indicates that historically, in 2015 and 2018, the weekly RSI formed a cyclical bottom after touching this range; while in 2022, it consolidated for about five months after bottoming out before finally establishing a macro bottom. Although the current market trend may not completely replicate historical paths, the weekly RSI's approach to the "cyclical low" range is considered an important reference signal for the current market phase.

data.title: The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has added Victory Fintech to its licensed list, marking the first new virtual asset trading platform added since June last year.
data.description: The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) announced the addition of Victory Fintech Company Limited to its list of officially licensed virtual asset trading platforms. The official website now shows a total of 12 licensed crypto and blockchain-related institutions. This marks the first new addition of crypto trading platform licenses since the approval of Hong Kong BGE in June 2025. Since June 2024, Hong Kong authorities have criminalized the operation of unlicensed virtual asset trading platforms, leading several exchanges to withdraw from the Hong Kong market, including OKX and Bybit, which withdrew their license applications. Furthermore, Christopher Hui, Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, previously stated that the regulator plans to submit a draft legislation on crypto asset advisory service providers in 2026. While 12 companies have already been licensed by the SFC, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has not yet listed any licensed stablecoin issuers. Notably, the SFC recently issued guidelines allowing licensed brokers to provide virtual asset margin financing services, initially accepting only Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) as collateral. The regulator also announced a framework allowing trading platforms to offer perpetual contract trading to professional investors.

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description: 1. The Fear & Greed Index in the crypto market has fallen to a record low, with market sentiment remaining depressed; 2. Wintermute launched institutional-grade tokenized gold trading, projecting a market size of $15 billion by 2026; 3. Michael Saylor posted "Markets closed, BTC open," without disclosing any information about increasing his holdings; 4. South Korean police confirmed the outflow of 22 BTC involved in a case, and are investigating the internal circulation path and the possibility of personnel involvement; 5. A7A5, the issuer of the sanctioned ruble stablecoin, is accelerating its expansion, claiming its business is fully compliant.

data.title: Two hours ago, an address associated with the Pump.fun custodian wallet sold 543 million PUIMP tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, an address associated with the Pump.fun custodian wallet sold 543.23 million PUIMP tokens two hours ago, receiving 1.207 million USDC. This wallet received 3.75 billion PUMPs, worth $25.39 million, seven months ago.
